proof:
have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 1 := by
    have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3)) := by
      apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
      exact h2
    have h5 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (2 * (21 * n + 4)) := by
      apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
      exact h1
    have h6 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4)) := by
      apply Nat.dvd_sub'
      · exact h4
      · exact h5
    have h7 : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h7] at h6
    exact h6
  have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h3
  exact h4
failed_attempts:
have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by 
    rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 1 * (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]
    simp [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right]
    all_goals omega
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
    have h3 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by 
      omega
    rw [h3]
    simp [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right, Nat.gcd_comm]
    all_goals omega
  rw [h1, h2]
  all_goals omega

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    have h2 : 21 * n + 4 = 1 * (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) := by
      omega
    have h3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
    have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := by
      have h5 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
      have h6 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
      have h7 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4 - (1 * (14 * n + 3))) := by
        apply Nat.dvd_sub'
        · -- Show that gcd (21*n+4) (14*n+3) divides 21*n+4
          exact h5
        · -- Show that gcd (21*n+4) (14*n+3) divides 1*(14*n+3)
          apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
          exact h6
      have h8 : 21 * n + 4 - (1 * (14 * n + 3)) = 7 * n + 1 := by
        omega
      rw [h8] at h7
      exact h7
    have h5 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
    have h6 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
    have h7 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
      have h8 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
      have h9 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := by
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
      have h10 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1) := by
        have h11 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := by
          apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
        have h12 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
          apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
          exact h11
        have h13 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1) := by
          apply Nat.dvd_add
          · -- Show that gcd (14*n+3) (7*n+1) divides 2*(7*n+1)
            apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
            exact h11
          · -- Show that gcd (14*n+3) (7*n+1) divides 1
            have h18 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (14 * n + 3 - 2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
              apply Nat.dvd_sub'
              · -- Show that gcd (14*n+3) (7*n+1) divides 14*n+3
                exact h8
              · -- Show that gcd (14*n+3) (7*n+1) divides 2*(7*n+1)
                apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
                exact h11
            have h19 : 14 * n + 3 - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
              omega
            rw [h19] at h18
            exact h18
        exact h13
      have h14 : 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 = 14 * n + 3 := by
        omega
      rw [h14] at h10
      exact h10
    have h8 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
      apply Nat.dvd_antisymm
      · -- Show that gcd (21*n+4) (14*n+3) divides gcd (14*n+3) (7*n+1)
        exact Nat.dvd_gcd h3 h4
      · -- Show that gcd (14*n+3) (7*n+1) divides gcd (21*n+4) (14*n+3)
        exact Nat.dvd_gcd h5 h7
    exact h8
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
    have h3 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
      rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 by omega]
      simp [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right]
    rw [h3]
    simp
  rw [h1, h2]

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    have h2 : 21 * n + 4 = (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) := by
      omega
    rw [h2]
    simp [Nat.gcd_add_self]
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
    have h3 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h3]
    simp [Nat.gcd_add_mul_self, Nat.gcd_comm]
  rw [h1, h2]
  all_goals omega

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left_right, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_add]
    all_goals omega
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
    have h3 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h3]
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left_right, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_add]
    all_goals omega
  rw [h1, h2]
  all_goals omega

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by 
    have g1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
      rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]
      simp [Nat.gcd_add_self_right]
    have g2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
      have h2 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by 
        omega
      rw [h2]
      simp [Nat.gcd_add_self_right, Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
    have g3 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 = 1 := by 
      simp [Nat.gcd_one_right]
    rw [g1, g2, g3]
  exact h1

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    have g1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
      rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 1 * (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]

    have g2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
      rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 by omega]
      simp [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right]
    have g3 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 = 1 := by
      simp
    rw [g1, g2, g3]
  exact h1

    rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]
    simp [Nat.gcd_add_self_right]

    have h3 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    have g1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
      simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_mul_self]
      <;> ring_nf <;> omega
    have g2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
      have h2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by 
        exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1)
      have h3 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := by 
        exact Nat.gcd_dvd_right (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1)
      have h4 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ 1 := by
        have h5 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ ((14 * n + 3) - 2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
          apply Nat.dvd_sub'
          · -- Show that gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) divides (14 * n + 3)
            apply Nat.dvd_trans h2
            norm_num
          · -- Show that gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) divides 2 * (7 * n + 1)
            apply Nat.dvd_trans h3
            norm_num
            all_goals omega
        have h6 : (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
          omega
        rw [h6] at h5
        exact h5
      have h7 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
        exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h4
      exact h7
    rw [g1, g2]
  exact h1

    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h3
  exact h4

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by 
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by 
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 1 := by
    have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (2 * (21 * n + 4) ) := by
      apply dvd_trans h1
      norm_num
    have h5 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) ) := by
      apply dvd_trans h2
      norm_num
    have h10 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) ) := by
      apply Nat.dvd_sub'
      · -- Show that Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3)
        apply dvd_trans h2
        norm_num
      · -- Show that Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 2 * (21 * n + 4)
        apply dvd_trans h1
        norm_num
    have h11 : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by 
      omega
    rw [h11] at h10
    exact h10
  have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h3
  exact h4

have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 1 * (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_self_right, Nat.gcd_add_self_left]
    all_goals omega
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
    have h4 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h4]
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_self_right, Nat.gcd_add_self_left]
    all_goals omega
  rw [h2, h3]
  all_goals omega

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (7 * n + 1) + (14 * n + 3) by omega]
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_self_right]
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 by omega]
    simp [Nat.gcd_add_mul_self, Nat.gcd_comm]
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 = 1 := by
    simp
  rw [h1, h2, h3]

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
    have h3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
    have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4)) := by
      apply Nat.dvd_sub'
      · apply Nat.dvd_trans h3
        norm_num
        all_goals omega
      · apply Nat.dvd_trans h2
        norm_num
        all_goals omega
    have h5 : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h5] at h4
    have h6 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
      exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h4
    exact h6
  exact h1

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 1 := by
    have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4)) := by
      apply Nat.dvd_sub'
      · -- Show that `Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3)` divides `3 * (14 * n + 3)`
        apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
      · -- Show that `Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3)` divides `2 * (21 * n + 4)`
        apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
    have h5 : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h5] at h4
    exact h4
  have h4 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h3
  exact h4

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
    apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4)) := by
    apply Nat.dvd_sub'
    · -- Show that gcd divides 3 * (14 * n + 3)
      apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
      exact h2
    · -- Show that gcd divides 2 * (21 * n + 4)
      apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
      exact h1
  have h4 : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by
    omega
  rw [h4] at h3
  have h5 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h3
  exact h5

have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_self_right]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> omega
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    have h4 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
      omega
    rw [h4]
    simp [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_add_self_right, Nat.gcd_add_self_left]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> omega
  rw [h2, h3]
  all_goals omega

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by 
    have eq1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
      rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 1 * (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) by omega]
      simp [Nat.gcd_comm]
      <;> try { tauto }
    have h2 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by 
      have h3 : (14 * n + 3 : ℕ) % (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
        have h4 : (14 * n + 3 : ℕ) = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
          omega
        rw [h4]
        simp [Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod]
        <;> try { tauto }
      have h4 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (14 * n + 3 : ℕ) := by
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
      have h5 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (7 * n + 1 : ℕ) := by
        apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
      have h9 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ ((14 * n + 3 : ℕ) - 2 * (7 * n + 1) : ℕ) := by
        apply Nat.dvd_sub'
        · apply h4
        · apply Nat.dvd_trans h5
          norm_num
          all_goals omega
      have h10 : (14 * n + 3 : ℕ) - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
        omega
      rw [h10] at h9
      have h11 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (1 : ℕ) := h9
      have h12 : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
        exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one h11
      exact h12
    rw [eq1]
    exact h2
  exact h1

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
    have eq1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
    have eq2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := by
      apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
    have eq3 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 1 := by
      have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4)) := by
        apply Nat.dvd_sub'
        · apply Nat.dvd_trans eq2
          norm_num
        · apply Nat.dvd_trans eq1
          norm_num
      have h3 : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by
        omega
      rw [h3] at h2
      exact h2
    have h7 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by
      exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one eq3
    exact h7
  exact h1
